name: @sumup/medusa-plugin
description: SumUp online payments provider for Medusa v2.
author: SumUp <support@sumup.com> (https://sumup.com/)

scripts.format: biome format --write src package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts README.md biome.json examples/docker/medusa/package.json examples/docker/medusa/medusa-config.ts examples/docker/README.md
scripts.format:check: biome format src package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts README.md biome.json examples/docker/medusa/package.json examples/docker/medusa/medusa-config.ts examples/docker/README.md
scripts.lint: biome lint src package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts README.md biome.json examples/docker/medusa/package.json examples/docker/medusa/medusa-config.ts examples/docker/README.md
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint --write src package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts README.md biome.json examples/docker/medusa/package.json examples/docker/medusa/medusa-config.ts examples/docker/README.md
